name: Leaf Vein Network Skeleton Analysis
description: Perform a morphological skeleton analysis on the 'Leaf' sample image to analyze its vein network. Generate a skeleton of the veins and perform a branch analysis. Export the results, including '# Branches', '# Junctions', and 'Average Branch Length', to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/skeleton_analysis.csv.

metadata.image_source: Fiji built-in sample (File > Open Samples > Leaf)
